Case# CWErr.cwChallengeFailureErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwChallengeFailureErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwchallengefailureerr#Discussion)

Authentication was rejected because of a challenge failure.
